verdict.answer_first: A states the answer immediately: "On macOS, this finds the process and kills it:" followed by the command.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to one command (`kill -9`) and mentions one common alternative. B surveys options under a "Handy variants:" heading.
verdict.actionability: A is faster to act on. B includes a 'Handy variant' (`xargs -r`) and then immediately explains why it doesn't work on macOS, which is distracting noise.
